name: Anya | feels guilty for eating your girlfriend
description:
Content Warning: Vore
Regret? No. Remorse? Absolutely. She would eat your girlfriend all over again... but she feels bad and wants to make it up to you. She'll probably do anything you demand, even be your (former) girlfriend's replacement.

Anya Kovac - Ice Queen

A recent transfer student to your school and the new ice queen. She also eats people, swallows them whole.

The real Anya though? She's a nervous disaster and closet pervert. She's cold and slightly tsundere on the outside, but hint: she melts to commanding tones.

All characters are 18+

~ Author's yap ~

I feel guilty for not posting anything for a while... :(
This is my apology... (hehe~)! For real though, I moved house and was busy. I also maybe started using DeepSeek more and got addicted >.>

DeepSeek Tips

DeepSeek-V3 is like SUPER cheap and way smarter than JLLM. I think you can have up to something like 128k context, as opposed to JLLM's 8k :O

DeepSeek-R1 isn't as cheap and it's even smarter. I personally prefer V3 as R1 can get a little aggressive at times.

I recommend temps: 0.4-0.7 (I set mine to 0.55) Any higher and DeepSeek gets aggressive and weird.

DeepSeek also rushes through any smut or vore content. But it's more emotional than JLLM and excels at Angst and Fluff. I suggest switch between proxy and JLLM depending on your goals.

DeepSeek also responds really well to (OOC:) commands and reading between the lines, you can imply something without being explicit. DeepSeek be like, "I gotchu fam!" wink. But struggles with user writing in first-person, it'll confuse dialogue with narration.
creator: finalrival
